evals.prompt: Map the internal business process the user described, producing all four sub-artifacts.
evals.expected_output: An internal process map written to the resolved layout path (<parent>/processes/<slug>.md) with frontmatter `type: process-flow`. Before writing, the skill surfaces the resolved absolute path. The artifact contains four sub-artifacts: (1) a SIPOC scoping table with all five columns populated (Suppliers, Inputs, Process, Outputs, Customers); (2) an as-is swimlane in mermaid flowchart with subgraph lanes per actor, decision gateways marked, and handoffs between lanes shown; (3) a to-be swimlane and an as-is→to-be delta table with Step / As-is / To-be / Rationale columns; (4) a pain/waste register mapping each as-is waste source to a to-be change. The map is anchored at APQC L3 (named process: trigger → outcome → roles) and decomposed to L4 activities (handoffs + decision gates in the lanes); no L5 task detail appears. The artifact ends with a Seams section naming `frame-intent` (`product-engineering`) as the consumer, and cross-referencing `service-blueprint` by name when the process is customer-triggered. No platform/surface axis appears anywhere. No APQC framework text, full BPMN XML, reprinted values tables, color literals, or dimension/duration literals appear in the output.
assertions: Surfaces the resolved absolute output path before the first write
SIPOC table is present with all five columns: Suppliers, Inputs, Process, Outputs, Customers
As-is swimlane is a mermaid flowchart with subgraph lanes per actor and decision gateways
To-be swimlane is present alongside the as-is
As-is to-be delta table is present with Step / As-is / To-be / Rationale columns
Pain/waste register is present and maps each waste source to a to-be change
Process is anchored at APQC L3 and decomposed to L4 — no L5 task detail
Seams section names frame-intent (product-engineering) as the consumer
No platform/surface axis appears in the artifact
No APQC framework text, full BPMN XML, values tables, color literals, or dimension/duration literals appear
